normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 - Scheme Map No. 1 of 8 (Attadale and Bicton Localities)
version_date: Plot date 11 May 2022 (Version No 1; LPS6 gazetted Friday 27 May 2016)
scope_summary: Statutory scheme map sheet 1 of 8 under the City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 covering the Attadale and Bicton localities. Depicts local scheme zones (Residential, Centre, Mixed Use, Light Industry, Service Commercial, Special Use, etc.), local scheme reserves, Metropolitan Region Scheme region reserves, R-Codes density codings (R12.5 through R60 plus A10), and additional-use (A1), restricted-use (R1) and special-use (SU1) areas. Used to determine the zoning and density coding applicable to individual lots in these localities.
quality_flags: scheme map drawing: low text volume is expected; extracted text is map labels and legend only

OCR of map labels yields fragmented and reversed street-name strings (e.g. 'TEERTS SIRRAH'); spatial zoning/coding assignments are not recoverable from text alone - use the original PDF or GIS data for lot-level determinations
